scripts.dev: concurrently --names API,Vite --prefix-colors blue,green "node scm-api/server.js" "npx --prefix scm-app vite --config scm-app/vite.config.js --root scm-app"
scripts.build: cd scm-api && npm install && cd ../scm-app && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: cd scm-api && npm install && cd ../scm-app && npm install
